MycelialTask.title: MycelialTask
MycelialTask.description: Represents a task node in the mycelial biological neural network.

id.description: The unique identifier of the task node.

description.description: A detailed description of the task.

deadline.description: The ISO 8601 deadline timestamp of the task.

connectedTo.description: Array of connected task IDs representing mycelial hyphae.

riskScore.description: Current threat risk score between 0 and 100.

decayRate.description: Rate at which risk score increases.

completed.description: Whether the task has been resolved.

/tasks/{taskId}.description: Subterranean collection of mycelial network tasks.
